item.title: A coastal neighborhood blocked the public from a park. Now, it’s agreed to invite them in.
item.description:

The post A coastal neighborhood blocked the public from a park. Now, it’s agreed to invite them in. appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:

item.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits
item.description:
Trump’s order would have upended widely held views that the 14th Amendment confers citizenship on everyone born in the U.S., excluding only the children of foreign diplomats and those born to a foreign occupying force.

The post Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/30074346/ap26180612718772-899019-sv39rajk-653113-4ZlmnyCD-1024x683.jpg)
Trump’s order would have upended widely held views that the 14th Amendment confers citizenship on everyone born in the U.S., excluding only the children of foreign diplomats and those born to a foreign occupying force.

item.title: LA County drug overdose deaths declined for third straight year in 2025, mirroring national trend
item.description:
L.A. County’s overdose strategy leans heavily on “harm reduction” — a public health approach that treats addiction as a health condition and focuses on keeping drug users alive rather than requiring abstinence.

The post LA County drug overdose deaths declined for third straight year in 2025, mirroring national trend appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
